whatsapp_prefill: Hi Laurent, I'd like to discuss a project.
hero_subtitle: Senior software engineer. 10+ years of production systems.
portfolio_meta_description: Selected work by Laurent Curau, independent software engineer in Monaco. B2B e-commerce, multilingual real-estate site, editorial portfolio + custom web FTP.
portfolio_hero_paragraph: From B2B e-commerce to multilingual real-estate platforms and editorial portfolios — every project is designed, built and shipped end-to-end.
afida_tagline: A B2B packaging store the Mandarin Oriental orders from.
afida_summary: Custom Rails 8 e-commerce for eco-friendly packaging. Stripe checkout, scheduled reorders, free-samples flow, a branded-product configurator with quantity tiers, and a Google Merchant feed. Trusted by 500+ UK businesses including the Mandarin Oriental, Marriott, Edwardian Hotels and Hawksmoor.
gare_tagline: Pioneer real-estate agency in Monaco, online since 1942.
gare_summary: Website for one of Monaco's oldest real-estate agencies (founded 1942, Chambre Immobilière member). 9 locales, daily property sync from the Immotoolbox API, per-property PDF brochures generated with Typst, multi-currency display backed by a daily FX refresh, and a YouTube content feed.
cca_tagline: Heritage Monaco architect, plus a custom web FTP for handing off CAD files.
cca_summary: Editorial portfolio for Christian Curau Architecte — founded 1984, Conservateur du Palais Princier. Two deliverables: a sober, project-led marketing site, and a stateless web FTP/FTPS client (CCA-FTP) so the firm could share large CAD files securely, without a desktop tool. No database — credentials live in encrypted cookies for the session only.
services_section_subtitle: Specification, design, code, deployment, monitoring, on-call. One engineer for the whole stack.
service_1_summary: Server-rendered, properly indexed, often multilingual. From editorial portfolios to multi-language real-estate sites with translated URL slugs and per-locale sitemaps.
service_1_bullet_3: PDF brochures, video feeds, CRM sync
service_2_summary: Stripe checkout, scheduled reorders, custom product configurators, free-samples flow, Google Merchant feed. From cart logic to shipping options to admin dashboard — all custom, no Shopify lock-in.
service_3_summary: Full custom web applications. Rails 8 backend, Hotwire on the front, Postgres behind. Auth, roles, audit logs, background jobs, deployment, monitoring — the boring parts done right.
service_3_bullet_3: Deployed on Kamal, monitored with Sentry
service_4_summary: The software that runs your back-office. CRMs, dashboards, sync engines, compliance workflows. KYC, sanctions screening, STRIX reporting, third-party API integration — built around your operations.
how_section_title: No tickets. No queue. No middlemen.
how_point_1: Not an account manager. Not a PM. The person writing your code is the same person you message at 9am about a bug.
how_point_2: No queues, no Slack channels to babysit, no JIRA. A short async message when something needs my eyes, a weekly written update for the rest.
how_point_3_title: Two or three clients. That's it.
how_point_3: I take a handful of clients at a time. When I'm full, I'll tell you — I won't pretend. You're never project #37.
pricing_title: One price. One engineer. No surprises.
pricing_subtitle: Flat monthly fee. Cancel any month.
pricing_feature_2: Unlimited requests, one at a time
pricing_note_text: You message requests. I ship them, one at a time. No limits. No commitment.
personal_eyebrow: The engineer you'd actually work with
personal_message_1: I've been writing production software for over ten years — primarily Ruby on Rails, plus everything that lives around it: Postgres, background jobs, integrations, deployment, on-call.
personal_message_2: I work with Monaco SMEs because I live here and I know the local pain: software priced for global enterprises, agencies that send junior staff after they win the pitch, freelancers who disappear between projects. I don't subcontract. I don't fixed-price work I haven't scoped. I won't pretend I have capacity when I don't.
contact_subtitle: Quick message, no commitment. If we're a fit, we'll know in 15 minutes.
contact_form_message: What are you trying to ship?
contact_form_message_placeholder: Internal tool? Rebuild of an old Rails app? Compliance workflow? Tell me roughly what you have in mind.
contact_form_success: Message sent. I'll reply within a few hours.
footer_brand_description: Senior software engineer in Monaco. Production software, end-to-end, by one person.
services_page_subtitle: Five categories of work I take end-to-end. Specification, design, code, deployment, on-call.
services_page_process_step_1: You reach out. We figure out in 15 minutes whether I'm the right fit. No deck, no commitment.
services_page_process_step_2: I ship one concrete thing in the first two weeks. You judge me on output, not promises.
services_page_process_step_3: You message requests. I work them one at a time. You see progress every week.
services_page_process_step_4: Your needs change, I adapt. Cancel any month. No notice-period games.
case_afida_meta_title: Afida — Custom Rails 8 B2B e-commerce | Laurent Curau
case_afida_meta_description: Custom Rails 8 e-commerce for eco-friendly packaging. Stripe, scheduled reorders, branded-product configurator, Google Merchant feed. Trusted by 500+ UK businesses.
case_afida_description: Custom-built B2B e-commerce platform for an eco-friendly packaging brand. The stack pairs Rails 8 with Hotwire on the front and Postgres behind, Stripe Checkout for hosted payments with three shipping options and automatic UK VAT, scheduled reorders with a review-before-charge flow, a branded-product configurator with design uploads and quantity tiers, free-sample requests for lead capture, and a live Google Merchant XML feed. Used daily by 500+ UK hospitality and food businesses including the Mandarin Oriental, Marriott and Hawksmoor.
case_afida_related_service_body: Stripe-powered B2B and B2C commerce, built end-to-end.
case_gare_meta_title: Agence de la Gare — Monaco real estate, 9 locales | Laurent Curau
case_gare_meta_description: Rails 8 multilingual real-estate site for Monaco's pioneer agency (founded 1942). 9 locales, Immotoolbox sync, Typst PDFs, multi-currency.
case_gare_description: Custom-built multilingual website for one of Monaco's pioneer real-estate agencies, founded in 1942 and a member of the Chambre Immobilière Monégasque. The Rails 8 stack pairs Hotwire for interactivity with route-translated i18n across nine locales (FR / EN / IT / DE / SV / NO / DA / FI / RU), daily Immotoolbox API sync via Solid Queue for districts, buildings and properties, per-property PDF brochures rendered with Typst, multi-currency display backed by a daily ECB exchange-rate refresh, and a YouTube content feed. Deployed with Kamal.
case_cca_meta_title: Christian Curau Architecte — Editorial site + custom web FTP | Laurent Curau
case_cca_meta_description: Sober editorial portfolio for a heritage Monaco architect, plus a stateless web FTP/FTPS client for sharing CAD files securely without a desktop tool.
case_cca_description: Two deliverables for a heritage Monaco architect — founded in 1984, Conservateur du Palais Princier. A sober Rails editorial portfolio centred on project pages, where typography does the heavy lifting and the homepage order is curated rather than chronological. Plus CCA-FTP, a stateless web FTP/FTPS client built so the firm can share large CAD files securely from any browser — protocol auto-selected from the username, encrypted-cookie sessions, no database to back up or leak, filename sanitisation and an invisible CAPTCHA against drive-by abuse. Both apps deploy with Kamal.
case_cca_related_service_body: Quiet software that sits behind your operations.
